generated_oml:
prefix base: http://example.org/base#
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]
instance DepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception",
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthDataTransmitted
]
instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor for vehicle speed",
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]
instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor for steering angle",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
]
instance DepthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DepthCamera
]
instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]
instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]
instance PointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]
instance DepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data from camera",
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthDataTransmitted
]
instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current speed of the vehicle",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]
instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current steering angle of the vehicle",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]
instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Combined vehicle speed and steering angle data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]
instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered object tracks from DBSCAN processing",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point cloud clustering using DBSCAN algorithm for object detection",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]
instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Object tracking using Kalman filter for maintaining object trajectories",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]
instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control logic based on ISO 15622 standard",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]
instance DBSCANProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering for object detection from LiDAR data",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]
instance KalmanFilterEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]
instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control logic implementation",
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]
instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring and visualization",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]
instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for vehicle state and object tracks storage",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]
instance Jetpack5SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for system development and optimization",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for real-time communication between components",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance computing",
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]
instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization, saving, and reporting of vehicle state data",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, VehicleStateDataInsight, DataSavingInsight, ReportingInsight
]
instance ACCComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Execution of ACC system logic on digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:provides ProjectedDrivingPathInsight, ACCControlAction
]
instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking via UI",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of object tracks, projected driving path, and vehicle state data"
]
instance ProjectedDrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path for driver decision-making"
]
instance VehicleStateDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current vehicle speed and steering angle data"
]
instance DataSavingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Vehicle state and object tracks saved to SQL database"
]
instance ReportingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated reporting of vehicle performance metrics"
]
instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control actions for adaptive cruise control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system via UI",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC via UI",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command via UI",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]
instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for controlling vehicle direction"
]
instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for onboard processing"
]
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoLiDAR, DepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderESC, SteeringServo, JetsonOrinNano
]
instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle built from a Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium teleoperated vehicle retrofitted with autonomy components",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment AutonomousVehicleEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of motor voltage commands for speed control, steering angle commands, and emergency braking signals to the physical vehicle."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Network latency ≤100 ms between vehicle and DT Entity, with clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms across all components per 3GPP V2V communication requirements."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Structured into Physical Twin Entity (not in ISO 23247), Digital Twin Entity, User Entity, and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), with each Functional Entity implemented as ROS2 packages."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated) for ACC system monitoring and control during vehicle operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-component communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity hosted externally with data stored in cloud-based SQL database."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework reference architecture adapted for automotive systems."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical requirements include 100 ms network latency and clock synchronization; ACC implemented per ISO 15622 Performance Class I. No specific cybersecurity measures detailed."
]
